description_long: This is a full-size computer keyboard with a standard rectangular shape and a matte black finish. The keyboard features a complete set of alphanumeric keys, a function row, navigation cluster, and a numeric keypad on the right side. The keycaps are slightly concave and uniformly spaced, with white printed legends for easy visibility. The surface appears to be made of hard plastic, and the overall build is slim and low-profile. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, and no brand logo is present on the surface. The keyboard is in clean, undamaged condition, with no visible signs of wear or discoloration.
description: A full-size black computer keyboard with white legends, including a numeric keypad and function row. The surface is matte plastic and the condition appears new.
description_view_0: The keyboard is seen from a front-left angle, highlighting the alphanumeric section and part of the numeric keypad.
description_view_1: A direct top-down side view shows the entire length of the keyboard, emphasizing its slim profile and full key layout.
description_view_2: The keyboard is viewed from a front-right angle, focusing on the numeric keypad and navigation keys.
description_view_3: A direct side view displays the keyboard's thinness and the even height of the keycaps across its length.
